zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Sancroft於大約1450年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可福雷辛費爾德時，他的父親John de Sancroft32歲，母親Mrs John de Sandcroft28歲。他於1475年與Alice Godbold在英國英格蘭素福爾可福雷辛費爾德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1504年2月10日之前在他的家鄉，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可福雷辛費爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Sancroft于大约1450年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可福雷辛費爾德时，他的父亲John de Sancroft32岁，母亲Mrs John de Sandcroft28岁。他于1475年与Alice Godbold在英国英格兰素福爾可福雷辛費爾德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1504年2月10日之前在他的家乡，埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可福雷辛費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Sancroft
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various minor places called Bancroft, from Old English bēan ‘beans’ (a collective singular) + croft ‘paddock, smallholding’.
History: John Bancroft came to MA on board the ‘James’ in 1632.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Sancroft was born about 1450, in Fressingfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, John de Sancroft, was 32 and his mother, Mrs John de Sandcroft, was 28. He married Alice Godbold in 1475, in Fressingfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died before 10 February 1504, in his hometown, and was buried in Fressingfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Sancroft est né environ 1450, à Fressingfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John de Sancroft, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Mrs John de Sandcroft, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Alice Godbold en 1475, à Fressingfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé avant 10 février 1504, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterré à Fressingfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Sancroft um 1450 in Fressingfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Sancroft 32 und seine Mutter Mrs John de Sandcroft 28. Er hat 1475 in Fressingfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Alice Godbold geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb vor 10. Februar 1504 in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Fressingfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Sancroft è nato il circa 1450 nel Fressingfield, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John de Sancroft, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Mrs John de Sandcroft, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Alice Godbold nel 1475, nel Fressingfield, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì prima del 10 febbraio 1504, nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolto a Fressingfield, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Sancroftが約1450年にイギリスイギリススフォルクフレシングフィールドで生まれた時，父John de Sancroftは32歳，母Mrs John de Sandcroftは28歳であった。1475年にイギリスイギリススフォルクフレシングフィールドでAlice Godboldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1504年2月10日以前に故郷で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクフレシングフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Sancroft(이)가 대략 1450년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 프레징필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Sancroft(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs John de Sandcroft(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1475년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 프레징필드에서 Alice Godbold(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1504년 2월 10일 이전 그의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 프레징필드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Sancroft nasceu aproximadamente 1450, em Fressingfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John de Sancroft, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Mrs John de Sandcroft, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Godbold em 1475, em Fressingfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu antes 10 de fevereiro de 1504, em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultado em Fressingfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Sancroft родился около 1450 г. в местности фрессингфиелд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John de Sancroft было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs John de Sandcroft, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Godbold в 1475 г. в местности фрессингфиелд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер перед 10 февраль 1504 г. в его родном городе и был похоронен в местности фрессингфиелд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.
